title: Dynamic Mapping at a diffrent board

posts.author: janadel (Yiannis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am trying to make a custom automation with the phrase “When status changes create an item in board”
I want to make the “item” in the phrase an item column values field in order to be able to dynamically map fields between the new item in the other board and the current board.

How can i have an item column values field in the recipe which takes the columns from another board ?

I have tried with with a custom entity as described Dynamic mapping

The problem is that the form I am getting this way looks different than the default form.

Thanks for your suggestions.

default1008×870 67.5 KB

custom1385×1385 60.3 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @janadel

Would you be able to please fill this form so that our team can help you with this?

posts.author: janadel (Yiannis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I don’t really understand why you are asking me to fill the form.
I am a registered user and you have all my information.
May it be because i am registered in dev community with another email address from the one i use to login to my company’s account ?
Should i contact you in the future via the form ?
I am confused.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @janadel,

We usually ask users to use the form for questions that might require some testing/further investigation, and/or to provide more information (so that we don’t ask users to share information publicly).

In this case for example, I would like to see your entire recipe and the configuration of the custom dynamic field + the object you are passing to it to the fields to be mapped into monday columns so I am sure I am giving you the most accurate answer.

Also if you open a request via the form, that goes into our queue and will be handled promptly by one of our team members (the queue is checked continuously while not all community topics are replied to immediately). The community is intended to be a space for monday users/devs to meet and share things + help each other. If we can help, we will be happy to, but our official support channel for some things is via the form

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: janadel (Yiannis)
posts.cookedHtml:
OK. I understand now.

I am submitting the form right now.

Thank you
